name: Happy Paws Dog Walking
description: Reliable, insured dog walking for busy owners in Kitsilano and surrounding areas. Solo walks available for dogs who prefer one-on-one attention. GPS tracking and post-walk photos included.

testimonials.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Amazing with our anxious rescue dog. He actually gets excited when she shows up now!

testimonials.author: James T.
testimonials.text: Reliable and communicative every single walk. Highly recommend for anyone in Kits.

name: West End Pet Sitting
description: In-home pet sitting and overnight stays for dogs and cats in the West End. Your pet stays comfortable in their own environment while you travel. Daily updates and photos provided.

testimonials.author: Linda K.
testimonials.text: Our cats were so relaxed when we got home. No stress, no vet bills. Just happy cats.

testimonials.author: Tom R.
testimonials.text: We've used West End Pet Sitting three times now. Never going back to boarding.

name: Kits Grooming Studio
description: Full-service grooming studio in the heart of Kitsilano. Specializing in all breeds, with a calm and stress-free environment. Services include bath, brush, cut, nail trim, and ear cleaning.

testimonials.author: Priya N.
testimonials.text: My doodle used to hate grooming. After two sessions here she walks in happily.

testimonials.author: David L.
testimonials.text: Best cut in Vancouver. They took their time and my dog looked incredible.

name: Downtown Dog Walks
description: Professional dog walking in Downtown Vancouver and Yaletown. Group and solo walks, 30 or 60 minutes. Fully insured with first aid certification. Perfect for condo dogs who need daily exercise.

testimonials.author: Michelle W.
testimonials.text: Perfect for our condo pup. She gets her energy out every day without fail.

testimonials.author: Ryan S.
testimonials.text: Professional and punctual. Our dog is always tired and happy after his walks.

name: Burnaby Pet Care
description: Caring and experienced pet sitter based in Burnaby. Drop-in visits, full overnight stays, and extended care available. Dogs, cats, and small animals welcome. References available on request.

testimonials.author: Angela F.
testimonials.text: She looked after our rabbit and guinea pig for two weeks. Everything was perfect.

testimonials.author: Carlos M.
testimonials.text: Very affordable and genuinely caring. Our dog loves her.

name: North Van Grooming Co.
description: Boutique grooming salon in North Vancouver with over 10 years of experience. Specializing in doodles, double-coated breeds, and anxious dogs. By appointment only to keep things calm and quiet.

testimonials.author: Stephanie B.
testimonials.text: My anxious golden actually fell asleep during the session. That says everything.

testimonials.author: Mark H.
testimonials.text: They know double-coated breeds better than anyone I've found in the city.

name: Mount Pleasant Walkers
description: Community-focused dog walking collective based in Mount Pleasant. All walkers are background-checked, insured, and dog first aid certified. Small group walks keep costs low and socialization high.

testimonials.author: Nina O.
testimonials.text: Great value and my shy dog has made friends on the group walks. Worth every penny.

testimonials.author: Ben A.
testimonials.text: The team is super communicative. I always know how the walk went.

name: Yaletown Pet Hotel
description: Premium in-home pet boarding in a spacious Yaletown condo. Your dog gets treated like family — couch privileges included. Ideal for small to medium breeds. Limited spots available.

testimonials.author: Julia C.
testimonials.text: My dog comes home more relaxed than from any kennel. It truly feels like a home away from home.

testimonials.author: Patrick D.
testimonials.text: Responsive, caring, and sends the best photos. Our go-to every trip.
